user.title: Use Existing Hue Integrations
user.description: This integration requires Home Assistant Hue integrations to already be installed and configured. It will auto-discover all configured Hue bridges and sync scenes across all of them.

error.missing_hue: No configured Hue integration with usable credentials was found

data.auto_update_on_circadian_change: Auto sync when circadian sensor changes
data.auto_create_on_area_change: Auto create scenes on area updates
data.include_on_action: Set scene actions to turn lights on
